title: Sabo's equipment from One Piece
description: This is Sabo's equipment from One Piece
body:
## This mod includs Sabos tophat his new pipe and his old pipe from when he was a child.

### the **_tophat_** gives fire resistance
### the _new pipe_ has 8 attack damage and hits with the attack speed of 2 
### the _normal pipe_ has 7 attack damage and hits with the attack speed of 2

### recipes dont exist yet
### 



<details>
<summary>Sabo's tophat</summary>

![Sabos Top Hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ff93b94a2d6d97606d96dfee0088199fd9cd76e.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Normal Pipe</summary>

![Normal Pipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0494cf63ff2bacb536954ff3e20dd61cdf360f0d.png)


</details>


<details>
<summary>New Pipe</summary>

![New Pipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4348007f848e344324e7842921ec5b96c6479179.png)

</details>

### this mod does not work properly with optifine 
###
